title: oreophilus lupulus
intro: Oreophilus lupulus, also known as Hops, is a perennial plant with the botanical name Humulus lupulus, belonging to the Cannabaceae family. Hops have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Hops include relief from insomnia, anxiety, and restlessness, as well as alleviation of menstrual cramps and menopausal symptoms. Hops are commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or added to beer for their calming and sleep-promoting effects.
